hero-desc-1: Passionate about all things accessibility, user experience, and UI design to code.
hero-desc-2: Curious about typography and why building emails is so dang difficult!
about-card-code-title: Design, brought to life in code
about-card-code-desc: I focus on bringing designs to life in code and finding ways to further improve the user experience. I'm currently a collaborator with Chakra UI, helping improve a low-level, a11y-focused design system for React and Vue. Open source is my jam! 🤘
about-card-origin-desc: I'm a classically-trained musician of over 15 years 🎺 who made the leap into web development. Critical thinking, problem solving, and adaptability transpose directly onto any team or stack. Supply the tools and I'll adapt.
reach-out-desc: I'm actively seeking new opportunities and would be delighted to talk. Reach out below — I'd be thrilled to contribute to your team or help bring your project to fruition.
footer-desc: This site is built with NextJS, TypeScript, and Chakra UI
